digest.title: Sync and Stream: GeForce NOW Connects to Members’ Game Libraries Across Devices
digest.tldr: Play favorite titles from popular game libraries, keep progress synced and jump back into gaming sessions on virtually any device.  That’s the power of GeForce NOW cloud gaming.
